safe_title: Generated diagram labels don't match actual project state
safe_summary: AI image generation produced architecture diagrams with wrong layer count (3 instead of 5), incorrect component names, and misplaced arrows. Required 3 regenerations to match reality.
safe_root_cause: Prompt for image generation did not include explicit checklist of labels and counts. Generator hallucinated plausible but incorrect text.

patch_suggestions.workflow_patch: Always include explicit text checklist in image generation prompts. Verify generated image labels against source of truth before committing.

verifier.name: visual-inspection-against-readme
verifier.details: Compared diagram labels to README.md counts — all 5 layers, 16 CLI, 9 rules matched
